comment: Hand-curated printings missing from Bandai's cardlist (e.g. release-stamp versions sold on Cardmarket). Merged into the catalog by scripts/transform.mjs on every scrape. Managed by the portfolio admin console; safe to edit by hand. Each print: id = <parentBaseId>_c<N>, parent = an existing catalog id whose data is cloned, name/image override the clone.

prints.name: I Know You're Strong... So I'll Go All Out from the Very Start!!!
